title: sorghum orientale
intro: Sorghum orientale, also known as broomcorn, is a species of flowering plant in the sorghum genus, native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorghum orientale include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as lowering cholesterol and blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Sorghum orientale include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including cardiovascular disease and diabetes.
